name: FIDUS INVESTMENT Corp
summary: . GENERAL Fidus Investment Corporation, a Maryland Corporation, operates as an externally managed business development company (BDC) under the Investment Company Act of 1940, as amended (1940 Act). FIC completed its initial public offering, or IPO, in June 2011. In addition, FIC has elected, and intends to qualify annually, to be treated as a regulated investment company (RIC) for U.S. federal income tax purposes under subchapter M of the Internal Revenue Code of 1986, as amended (the Code).
